perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white lace dress and a beige cardigan, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) She stands next to a white chest freezer (Liebherr brand), pointing at its price tag and features. (3) She demonstrates the sliding glass lid of the freezer, opening and closing it repeatedly to show the movement. (4) The camera alternates between medium shots of her talking and close-ups of the freezer's details, including the logo and the price. Background shoppers and warehouse shelves are visible throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop/electronic background music starts immediately and continues throughout. (2) A female voice (main character) speaks in an excited and friendly tone, introducing the freezer as a 'bedroom freezer'. (3) A male voice from behind the camera (off-screen) interacts with her, asking questions and making humorous remarks. (4) Cartoon-style sound effects (like a 'bling' or 'sparkle' sound) play occasionally when decorative text overlays appear.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top center. (2) Decorative Hook: '我要臥室冷凍櫃' (I want a bedroom freezer) in a stylized banner. (3) Price information: '$14,499' appears on screen. (4) Subtitles: Standard Chinese subtitles follow the spoken dialogue. (5) Decorative Text: '冷凍櫃' (Freezer) with a lifebuoy emoji and '划算' (Good deal) appear for emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Detail Inspection -> Discussion of Value -> Recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male shopper in red vest in background, 2 other blurred shoppers in distance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair wearing a white lace skirt, a striped top, and a beige cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large industrial warehouse interior with high ceilings, shelves of home appliances (washers, refrigerators), and price tags.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Demo -> User Benefit -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle recommendation and product review. It aims to persuade viewers of the utility and aesthetic appeal of a small Liebherr chest freezer available at Costco, specifically marketing it as a 'cute' and practical addition to a bedroom or home office.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of product brand, price tag, and positive commentary on build quality and price value.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with playful banter between the host and cameraman.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young homeowners or apartment dwellers in Taiwan looking for compact storage solutions. The use of 'cute' (可愛) to describe a freezer suggests a focus on home aesthetics.
